events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Jumping Jack Flash turns 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, the iconic music television channel, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV hit our screens and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation. What's your stand-out track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a dairy farm in upstate New York for three days of peace, love, and music. Woodstock. Iconic.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, the music world lost a true icon. Remembering the King, Elvis Presley. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on
events.blurb: Today would mark the anniversary of the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur on September 13, 1996, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a lyrical genius. Remembering the life and impact of Tupac Shakur. Still influencing music today.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: Today would mark the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix on September 18, 1970, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world said goodbye to a true guitar innovator. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring that iconic cover, on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs. What's your favourite from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The legendary frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still sounding brilliant.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years ago today, John Lennon released 'Imagine' in the UK. A song that still resonates globally with its message of peace and unity.

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod, changing how we listen to music, on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many did you have on yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, what's your favourite Bond film and who's your ultimate 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy legend.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but widely known as the 'White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed the 'White Album'. A double album packed with classics and experimentation. What's your hidden gem from it?
